source.definition: to become visible or to come into sight or existence

explanation.sourceText: The English verb "appear" comes from the Latin verb "apparēre", meaning "to become visible" or "to show oneself." It entered English through Old French in the late Middle Ages.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „appear“ provine din verbul latin „apparēre“, care înseamnă „a deveni vizibil“ sau „a se arăta“. A intrat în limba engleză prin franceza veche în Evul Mediu târziu.

source.additional: Regular verb, commonly used in both literary and everyday contexts.

target.definition: a deveni vizibil sau a avea loc

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian verb "a apărea" derives from the Latin "apparere", meaning "to become visible."
explanation.targetText: Verbul românesc „a apărea“ provine din latină, de la „apparere“, care înseamnă „a deveni vizibil“.

target.additional: Regular first conjugation verb (-a), frequently used to describe the appearance of something visible.

examples.sourceText: I appear punctually at the event.
examples.targetText: Eu apar la eveniment la timp.

examples.sourceText: Do you often appear in the newspaper?
Will you appear at the meeting tomorrow?
He appeared every Sunday at church.
examples.targetText: El apărea în fiecare duminică la biserică.

examples.sourceText: I had already appeared when the event started.
examples.targetText: Apărasem deja când a început evenimentul.

examples.sourceText: She will appear in the next broadcast.
examples.targetText: Ea o să apară în următoarea emisiune.

examples.sourceText: I would appear if I had an invitation.
examples.targetText: Aș apărea dacă aș avea o invitație.

examples.sourceText: It would be nice if you appear on time.
examples.targetText: Ar fi frumos să apari la timp.

examples.sourceText: The appeared edition has many new articles.
examples.targetText: Numărul apărut are multe articole noi.

examples.sourceText: By appearing, I bring fresh ideas.

learningTips.text: The Romanian verb "a apărea" sounds very similar to the English "appear" — link both words with the idea of becoming visible.
Imagine stepping onto a stage for the first time to 'appear' in front of an audience — this helps you remember "a apărea" means 'to appear.'
Practice sentences with "apăr" and "apare" in different tenses to get comfortable using the verb.
Think of the English phrase 'appear and disappear' to recall the Romanian antonym pair "a apărea" and "a dispărea."
